pattern: A right-to-left monotonic decreasing stack counts how many shorter people each person can see before a taller one blocks the view.
hints: A person sees people to their right until they hit someone taller than themselves.
Scan from right to left maintaining a stack of heights; everyone shorter than the current person that you pop is visible to them.

For each person, pop all stack entries shorter than them (each counts as visible), and if the stack is still non-empty after popping, that taller person is visible too before the line of sight is blocked.

edge_inputs.description: increasing run then a tall blocker
strictly decreasing heights, each sees only the next
strictly increasing heights, each is blocked immediately by the taller next
tall person at front sees several before a peak

stress.generator_python:
def gen(rng, size):
    n = max(1, size)
    vals = rng.sample(range(1, 100001), n)
    return [vals]
